song.title: I Am Young And I’m In Love
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A G A I am young and I'm in love .D A G A With the One who is from above. .D A G A All my days are just for Him. .D A G A All my being I open to Him.||
.D A G A Jesus You love me. .D A G A You took my place at Calvary. .D A G A Jesus You love me. .D A G A You gave Your life to save me. [V2] Others try the world and sin, But for me I only want Him. Lord Your beauty has captured my heart, So I give You every part.||
Jesus I love You. No other one compares to You. Jesus I love You. My all and life I give to You.
[V3] Jesus now is living in me. We'll be mingled as one entity. God's good pleasure His bride we'll be, As His wife for eternity.||
Hallelujah! We're in love! God loving us and we love Him. Hallelujah! We're in love! His masterpiece the New Jerusalem.
